title: juncus longistamineus
intro: Juncus longistamineus, also known as the Chinese rush or long-stamened rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Juncaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Juncus longistamineus include reducing fever, relieving cough and asthma symptoms, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Juncus longistamineus include dried rhizomes and roots, which can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use.
